1.premise: Needing a new place to live is made worse by a landlord who ignores the maintenance request to promote his DJ set.
Nobody wanting to live with someone is widely understood by silence but rarely said aloud.

2.premise: An AC repair request implies maintenance, but reveals landlord DJ promotion.
